name: conduit-code
description: Web UI relay for OpenCode. Access your OpenCode sessions from any device.

scripts.dev:all: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; tsx watch src/bin/cli.ts -- --foreground --restart-daemon & vite & wait
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-replay.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui: pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-replay.config.ts --ui
scripts.test:e2e:headed: pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-replay.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:e2e:debug: pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-replay.config.ts --debug
scripts.test:subagent-e2e: pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-subagent.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live: pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-live.config.ts
scripts.test:visual: pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-visual.config.ts
scripts.test:visual:update: pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-visual.config.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:visual:headed: pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-visual.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:storybook-visual: pnpm storybook:build && npx playwright test --config test/visual/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:storybook-visual:update: pnpm storybook:build && npx playwright test --config test/visual/playwright.config.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:all: pnpm check && pnpm lint && pnpm build && vitest run && vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.contract.config.ts && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-replay.config.ts && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-daemon.config.ts && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-multi-instance.config.ts && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-subagent.config.ts && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-visual.config.ts && pnpm storybook:build && npx playwright test --config test/visual/playwright.config.ts
